message:
fix(extent): clamp mapping chunk size to u32::MAX before try_from

The map_logical_to_physical loop now caps to_map at u32::MAX before
the try_from conversion, ensuring the subsequent u32::try_from can
never fail even with extreme hole_len or remaining_in_extent values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
